Package com.mps.deepviolet.api.scoring.rules

Interface RuleExpression

All Known Implementing Classes:
RuleExpression.And, RuleExpression.Comparison, RuleExpression.Contains, RuleExpression.CountFiltered, RuleExpression.FunctionCall, RuleExpression.Literal, RuleExpression.Not, RuleExpression.Or, RuleExpression.PropertyRef
public sealed interface RuleExpression permits RuleExpression.Literal, RuleExpression.PropertyRef, RuleExpression.Comparison, RuleExpression.And, RuleExpression.Or, RuleExpression.Not, RuleExpression.Contains, RuleExpression.FunctionCall, RuleExpression.CountFiltered
AST nodes for the rule expression DSL. Evaluated by RuleExpressionEvaluator against a RuleContext.
